title: OpenAI Deep Research normalizes reviewable plans and citation-backed reports
claim: OpenAI Deep Research is framed as a way to plan, research, and synthesize complex questions into documented reports with controllable sources, progress visibility, and citations.
source_snippet: Describe the outcome, choose sources, review the plan, follow progress, and get a cited report.
implication: ProductOS auto-research should expose source controls, plan previews, progress state, and evidence-linked output rather than opaque prompt execution.
followup_questions: Which ProductOS research modes need a plan preview versus a lightweight refresh path?
